accurate.why: Accurately describes the price-gouging prohibition (10% cap; 30/180-day windows; 50%-over-cost rule), FTC enforcement, and state/private rights of action.

no_hallucinations.why: Stafford Act / FTC context is accurate.

states_purpose.why: States the bill prohibits disaster price gouging.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Frames the prohibition as an unfair/deceptive practice enforced by the FTC.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the exceptions, including for higher costs.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers prohibition, enforcement, penalties, and rights of action.

correct_figures.why: 10%, 30/180 days, 50%, and 2-year limit match the text.
